testcase.name: test_multichip_two_layer_stacked_decode_layout_perf[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1492: tt::exception info: Statically allocated circular buffers on core range [0-0 - 9-9] grow to
